response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong leadership abilities, diverse technical experience, and a solid track record delivering products across multiple domains, they fall significantly short on a critical minimum qualification: 8 years of C++ programming experience. The candidate has only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (2014-2015) and has since pivoted to web and JavaScript ecosystems. Additionally, there is no evidence of leading cloud compute platform development or infrastructure platform teams, which is central to this role's responsibilities.
strengths: Proven technical leadership trajectory with multiple senior and staff roles, plus demonstrated mentoring through workshops and open-source projects
Substantial large-scale infrastructure experience including microservices at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests per second and building distributed systems
Strong track record shipping complete products from concept to production (GISCollective, WatchUp top-10 app) showing ability to drive ambiguous projects to completion
concerns: Critically lacks minimum C++ requirement—only ~6 months of professional experience over a decade ago; recent work has pivoted to TypeScript and JavaScript
No evidence of leading cloud compute platform development or building cloud infrastructure platforms at scale
Career trajectory shows divergence from systems programming toward web/backend ecosystems, moving away from the low-level infrastructure focus required for this role
